title: Diet Director
learning_goal_note: The Diet Director's learning goal is 100%. This is an independent learning goal for the Diet Director only and is not tied to the collective department phase advancement rule (which applies only to departments Bots 22-30).
is_department_note: The Diet Director (Bot 21) is NOT a department. The collective phase advancement rule (all departments must reach the same % before advancing) applies only to Bots 22-30.
note: Bot 21 is the Diet Director. Full configuration is maintained in bot_lead_diet_specialist_team.json. Bots 1–20 are the library bots; departments (22–30) must request access through the Diet Director to use them.

library_access_policy.note: The Diet Director may request library access directly from Copilot. Copilot is authorised to approve without escalating to starrm1. Extended access (>30 min or >1 session/day) still requires starrm1 approval. This privilege is exclusive to the Diet Director — departments (Bots 22–30) must still go through the full chain up to starrm1.

learning_log.entry: Daily learning update. Progress advanced from 12% to 15%.
Daily learning update. Progress advanced from 15% to 20%.
